fields.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
fields.description: Premium sound quality with 40-hour battery life and active noise cancellation. Perfect for music lovers and remote workers. Foldable over-ear design with memory foam cushions.

fields.name: Smart Watch Pro
fields.description: Track fitness, receive notifications, and manage your day. Water-resistant with 7-day battery, heart rate monitor, SpO2 tracking, and 50+ sport modes.

fields.name: USB-C Fast Charger 65W
fields.description: GaN technology compact 65W charger. Powers your laptop, phone, and tablet simultaneously. Folds flat, travel-friendly with universal compatibility.

fields.name: Mechanical Keyboard RGB
fields.description: Tactile Cherry MX switches with full RGB backlighting and per-key customization. N-key rollover, aluminium frame, detachable USB-C cable.

fields.name: True Wireless Earbuds
fields.description: 6mm drivers with deep bass. 8-hour playtime + 32 hours with case. IPX5 water resistant, touch controls, instant pairing.

fields.name: Classic Cotton T-Shirt
fields.description: 100% ring-spun cotton, pre-shrunk for a consistent fit wash after wash. Reinforced stitching, available in 10 colors. Comfortable for everyday wear.

fields.name: Slim Fit Chinos
fields.description: Premium stretch-cotton blend for all-day comfort. Wrinkle-resistant, machine washable. Perfect for office and casual settings.

fields.name: Oversized Hoodie
fields.description: Ultra-soft 380 GSM fleece hoodie. Kangaroo pocket, adjustable drawstring, dropped shoulders for a relaxed fit. Preshrunk and colorfast.

fields.name: Python Programming Guide
fields.description: Comprehensive Python from basics to advanced. Covers data structures, OOP, web development with Django, data science with Pandas. 600+ pages with real projects.

fields.name: DSA Interview Handbook
fields.description: Master Data Structures & Algorithms for top tech interviews. 300 curated problems with detailed solutions, complexity analysis, and patterns. Includes system design basics.

fields.name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle 1L
fields.description: Double-walled vacuum insulated. Keeps drinks cold 24h and hot 12h. BPA-free, leak-proof lid, wide mouth for ice cubes. Eco-friendly alternative to plastic.

fields.name: Non-Stick Cookware Set 5pc
fields.description: Granite-coated non-stick with PFOA-free coating. Includes 20cm saucepan, 24cm kadhai, 28cm fry pan, and lids. Induction and gas compatible.
